title: Saffron Prawn & Chickpea Stew
summary: There’s a misconception that healthy food has to be boring or complicated but this prawn and chickpea stew proves otherwise. It comes together quickly in one pan and packs in so much flavour and nutrition, with over 25g of protein and almost 9g of fibre per serving to support your gut health.

ingredients.label: 200g Frozen and Defrosted Peeled King Prawns
ingredients.name: Frozen Peeled King Prawn

ingredients.label: 200g Frozen and Defrosted Peeled King Prawns
ingredients.name: Prawn

method.description: Add your saffron to a small bowl and pour over the boiling water. Leave it for 15-20 mins to bloom.
Finely dice your onion, garlic cloves and red chilli. Slice your red pepper. Roughly chop your fresh parsley.

Heat a drizzle of olive oil in a pan set over a medium heat. Fry your onions for a few minutes until golden and caramelised then add the chopped garlic, chilli and sliced pepper and cook for a further 2 mins.

Add the paprika and cook it off for 30 seconds until fragrant. Add the drained chickpeas and the zest of the lemon then pour in the saffron stock. Leave to simmer for around 5 mins or until the sauce has thickened.
Taste to check the seasoning then add in the prawns and cook for a further 3 mins until they are cooked through.
Finish with a squeeze of lemon and the fresh parsley. Serve on its own or with some cooked grains or toasted sourdough.

chefs.name: Healthy by ZOE
chefs.summary: ZOE (@ZOE) is a science and nutrition company leading a movement to transform the health of millions through smarter food choices. ZOE means life in Greek — and ZOE passionately believes everyone can feel better and live longer, healthier lives by rethinking what they eat. ZOE conducts the world’s largest nutrition science study to better understand the relationship between food and health. Based on this research, their personalised nutrition program delivers tailored advice based on metabolic and gut health, turning complex science into clear step-by-step actions to improve your health with every meal. Become a member at zoe.com. All of their recipes are developed by nutritionists to help you embrace food that tastes amazing and makes you feel even better.
